category_sources: source_facts.description says fork of prboom+ focused on speedrunning; official README says dsda-doom is a successor of prboom+ with speedrunning and quality-of-life tooling.
display_name_sources: Official README heading uses dsda-doom; normalized display capitalization follows the project acronym DSDA and Doom naming.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the best official documentation surface and includes features, launcher, support notes, and standards links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/kraflab/dsda-doom; returned null per instruction not to re-determine existing repos.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a prboom+ successor focused on speedrunning, demo recording/playback, and Doom-family support.
